title: Support - Verify that data is correct after moving from Guest to Account linked to a Tenant
scenario: Support data (app version, tenant name, tenant id, user id, last connected) is correctly displayed in Poly Lens Menu > Support > App after switching from Guest account to Tenant-linked account
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Ensure the app is in Guest mode (no account logged in).
3. Navigate to the Account screen via the menu.
4. Log in with an account that is linked to a Tenant.
5. Navigate to Poly Lens Menu > Support > App section.
6. Observe the displayed support data: app version, tenant name, tenant id, user id, last connected.
expected: The Support > App section correctly displays the app version, tenant name, tenant id, user id, and last connected information after switching from Guest to an account linked to a Tenant.
